interface.name: PS_C_PrisonRequestsGrid
interface.definition:
a!localVariables( local!requests: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_queryRecordType_v2"( recordType: #"urn:appian:record-type:v1:869b0f23-8e42-4780-8dfc-89deb24c798d", pagingInfo: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_pagingInfo"(1, 5000, #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_sortInfo"(#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:869b0f23-8e42-4780-8dfc-89deb24c798d/ab4316cc-3bee-4bb9-b663-14ee81dc52b3")) ).data,
